changes.details: Fixed an issue where the application would not correctly convert times to the user's local time zone.
Fixed an issue where raid-train would still show the 'ANY' role in the thread creation message.
Updated dependencies to the latest versions.
Added a new feature in raid-management which gives pre-registered raid name options for custom raids.
Added a new feature to allow users to see the total number of players in each role.
Fixed an issue where raid-train would only show the first role in the list, instead of all roles.
Fixed an issue where the raid-train would not show the correct number of players in each role.
Updated dependencies to the latest versions.
